message: Jake
Yuriko
Huh, the office is pitch black. The key is also unlocked.
No way.
Is someone ransacking the office again?!
As I pressed my ear to the door, I could hear rustling inside.
It seems like someone is inside.
Huh?
Is everything okay?
Gathering my courage, I stepped inside.
It looked like the lights were off and the blinds were completely shut.
I fumbled along the wall and turned on the switch.
Whoa!!!
Huh,
are you okay?!
Hah.
What, it was you, Boss?
Geez, don’t scare me like that.
I saw you crouched in the corner of the room with a scalpel and a bottle of chemicals in your hands.
What in the world are you doing?
Huh, hehehe.
Hehehehehe.
It’s not 'hehehe,' when did you take this from my bag?
I’m sorryyy!
But I just couldn’t help but be really curious!
So, how was it?
I was about to investigate it when the Boss arrived, so I haven't done it yet.
Well, fine, let’s check it out now.
Yay, Boss, you understand!
So, we sprinkled Luminol reagent on the scalpel that Tony dropped.
Indeed, there was plenty of blood reaction on Tony's scalpel.
